ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., decision tree, random forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived, deprecated) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the model is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, max depth) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the hyperparameter is the default for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the metric is a primary metric for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the result is for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the result is the final result for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_versions_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_hyperparameters" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hyperparameter was assigned to the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hyperparameter assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_versions_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_versions_history_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)
